text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, random question... Do you like cherry
blossoms?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You mean, like sakura? Ehehe, why yes, I'd say I
like them very much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They're beautiful as they blossom, yet so
transient in nature. I find them extraordinarily
fascinating.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Right? Right? They bloom proudly but just for a
short moment. I'm glad you understand!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But... I've found a new reason to love them here
at this academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've met a Sakura who is always in full bloom,
who's always by my side.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A Sakura who's always by your side... Do you
mean...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... I just wanted to talk about cherry blossoms
with you, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Who would've thought you'd give me a riddle! I want to figure it out! I will figure it out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Aww... hehe. ♪ I suppose purity is another one of
Sakura's charms.
